action: Create videos for all dialogues at a time using the associated avatar ID.
fallback_action: If this fails, then inform the creator.

recipe.steps: Retrieve the current story and character-avatar associations from memory using the key 'stories.current_story'.
Parse the retrieved story content to separate the dialogues and corresponding avatars.
Generate videos for each dialogue using the associated avatar ID. Use the Generate_video tool with 'text' and 'avatar_id' parameters.
Store the generated video conv_id for each dialogue back in memory under the key 'stories.current_story'.
Verify the completion of the action including the persona name using the StatusVerifier tool.
